content: Self-Refine’s unlabeled, iterative self-feedback loop can be enhanced by integrating multiple inconsistent solving perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms to resolve the blind spot that single-perspective feedback cannot catch its own logical flaws. This creates a two-layer self-improvement framework where the outer layer iteratively refines raw outputs, while the inner layer leverages perspective inconsistency to generate higher-quality self-feedback without additional supervision or training.
